# Hugo Platret — AI Software Engineer

> AI Software Engineer with 7 years of full-stack experience, based in the Netherlands. Available remotely worldwide.

## Services

- Full-Stack Web Development (Django, Symfony, Laravel, WordPress, React, Next.js)
- AI Readiness Audits (workflow analysis, ROI assessment, strategic roadmap)
- Workflow Automation (agentic workflows, process automation, data pipelines)
- Custom LLM Integration (Claude API, OpenAI, RAG, fine-tuning, MCP servers)
- AI Chatbots (custom training, website integration, business-specific knowledge)
- AI-Assisted Development (Claude Code, agentic dev, team training)

## Tech Stack

- AI & ML: Agentic AI, LLM Integration (Claude, OpenAI, Llama), Custom MCP Servers, RAG, Prompt Engineering
- Languages: Python, PHP 8, JavaScript, TypeScript
- Frameworks: Symfony, Django, Laravel, React, Angular, Next.js
- Infrastructure: Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, AWS, MySQL, RabbitMQ, CI/CD

## Experience

- 7+ years software engineering
- 2+ years focused on AI/LLM integration
- 10+ satisfied clients
- 20+ projects delivered

## Key Projects

- Consolidated 16 golf club websites into a unified platform with AI chatbot
- Built HR system for crew scheduling at Rentman (event-industry SaaS)
- Led platform migration of 1M+ users at Tikamoon
- Built AI content generation features inside SaaS platforms
